name: iv-basic-ds
description: Design system base construido con StencilJS.

scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n stencil,storybook -c blue,magenta "stencil build --dev --watch --serve" "storybook dev -p 6006"
scripts.build:storybook: npm run clean && npm run build && storybook build -o www/storybook
scripts.build:netlify: npm run clean && npm run build && storybook build -o www/storybook
scripts.test:a11y:build: npm run build:netlify && npm run test:a11y
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build:netlify && npm run test:spec && npm run copy:coverage && npm run install:playwright && npm run test:a11y
scripts.test: npm run test:spec && npm run test:a11y
